address: Ground floor terrace flat, Hull city centre (exact address not captured)
lead_profile_text: EX-STL — With Residential Estates/Guests for 2 years. Active dissatisfaction: toilet leak left unaddressed caused £1,600 damage (wiped out entire month's earnings); fridge-freezer breakdown during 3-month relocation booking nearly caused cancellation; 4G Wi-Fi causing connectivity complaints and lost Amazon relocation client with negative reviews; property listed hotel-style with shared reviews and photos used to promote other units. Current occupancy 57% vs 71% market. Ground floor terrace (uncommon in Hull city centre); parking at £63/month.
emotional_profile: Engaged and detail-oriented. Measures manager on operational reliability, not revenue. Reference points for failure are the £1,600 toilet leak and lost Amazon relocation client. Close to switching — avoid overcomplicating the close.
delay_timeline: Deciding over long weekend; responding next week
